name: Clams Casino
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Hold the clams in a cloth and insert a knife between the shells.
3. Pry the shells apart, then sever the hinge muscle and discard the top shell.
4. Loosen the muscle in the lower shell.
5. Slice the compound butter into 24 equal pieces.
6. Place a piece of butter on each clam.
7. In a food processor, combine the rendered andouille sausage and bread crumbs together until fully incorporated.
8. Season with Essence.
9. Spread a tablespoon of the crust mixture onto each clam shell.
10. Using your hands, pat the crust firmly into the clam shell.
11. Top each shell with the bacon pieces.
12. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 4-6 minutes.
13. Remove from the oven.
14. Place the clams on a platter and garnish with parsley and Essence.
